source_pr.title: *: remove resolver.go
source_pr.body:
refer to #4787 
should be merged with https://github.com/pingcap/tidb-test/pull/398 
This commit removes resolver.go completely.
Now TiDB resolves table name in preprocessor.go, and resolves column names when building logical plan.

Resolving col name when building logical plan will raise a problem like:
``` sql
create table t(a int);
prepare stmt from 'select b from t'; // This sql should have caused an error, I'll fix it in next PR.
```

symptoms: {"select c, a as c from t order by c+1", true, true, ""}, (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: {"select c, a as c from t order by c+1", true, true, ""}, (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes `resolver.go` and refactors name resolution (move resolution into preprocessor/logical plan building). The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent failure, so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: {"select c, a as c from t order by c+1", true, true, ""}, (plan/logical_plan_test.go)

files: executor/compiler.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/metrics_test.go, executor/prepared.go, executor/prepared_test.go, new_session_test.go, plan/cbo_test.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/preprocess.go, plan/resolver.go, plan/resolver_test.go, plan/typeinfer_test.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go, util/ranger/range_test.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, ast/expressions.go, ast/ast.go, ast/base.go, ast/dml.go, plan/plans.go
